articles.author: WCAX News Team
articles.title: Vermont not participating in Trump administration’s ‘Great American State Fair’ - WCAX
articles.description: The event on the National Mall aims to highlight every state’s story, according to organizers.
articles.content:
MONTPELIER, Vt. (WCAX) - Vermont is not participating in national Freedom 250 celebrations, including the Great American State Fair, which several other states have also bowed out of.
